overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a wizarding school video game (likely Hogwarts Legacy) showing students in robes gathered in a covered wooden pavilion with stone flooring. Sunlight streams in from the open side revealing a green lawn outside, while characters engage in ambient idle animations and minor interactions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered courtyard pavilion of wizarding school

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of students socializing in the pavilion courtyard

student standing near wooden table looking toward the group

entered.detail: high vaulted wooden ceiling with exposed beams and rafters
large grey stone tiles covering the pavilion floor
thick wooden pillars supporting the roof structure
rustic wooden tables where students are gathered
sunlit grassy area visible through the open side of the pavilion
tall wooden cabinets with multiple compartments against the back wall
green plants in pots along the left edge

segments.scene_description: A static view of a covered wooden pavilion at a wizarding school, with students in house robes gathered around tables engaging in conversation. Sunlight streams in from the open side illuminating the stone floor, while wooden support beams and a high vaulted ceiling frame the scene. The camera remains fixed, capturing the ambient activity and architectural details of the courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze upon a bustling student gathering within a sun-drenched wooden pavilion. It begins by capturing the architectural scale of the space, where high vaulted ceilings and heavy wooden support beams frame a group of students in house robes. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the ambient activity of students conversing around tables, their figures illuminated by the bright light streaming across the stone floor. The scene finally settles into a quiet observation of the courtyard's atmosphere, blending the stillness of the stone architecture with the lively, idle interactions of the wizarding students.
